pages.text: Binky is $(l:creatures/death)Death$(/l)'s steed, and can be summoned by using his $(item)Skull$() on the ground. When Binky is killed, his skull will again fall to the floor, ready to be summoned once again.$(p)Binky is a $(item)Skeleton Horse$() with a lot of health and slightly faster than a normal $(item)Horse$().
